verses.geez:
ወለደብተራ ፡ ትገብር ፡ ላቲ ፡ ፲ዐጸደ ፡ እምብሰስ ፡ ዕፁፍ ፡ ወእምሕብረ ፡ ያክንት ፡ ወሜላት ፡ ወነት ፡ [ዕፁፍ ፡]
                  ኬሩቤን ፡ ወግብሩ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ማእነም ፡ ትገብርዎ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make the tabernacle, ten curtains of fine linen spun, and blue and purple, and scarlet spun with cherubs; thou shalt make them with work of a weaver.
translations.kjv: Moreover thou shalt make the tabernacle with ten curtains of fine twined linen, and blue, and purple, and scarlet: with cherubims of cunning work shalt thou make them.

verses.geez: ወኑኁ ፡ ለዐጸዱ ፡ ለ፩ዐጸድ ፡ ፳ወ፷በእመት ፡ ወ፬በእመት ፡ ፅፍሑ ፡ ፩ዐጸድ ፡ በመስፈርቲሁ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ለይኩን ።

translations.lxx: The length of one curtain shall be eight and twenty cubits, and one curtain shall be the breadth of four cubits: there shall be the same measure to all the curtains.
translations.kjv: The length of one curtain shall be eight and twenty cubits, and the breadth of one curtain four cubits: and every one of the curtains shall have one measure.

verses.geez: ኀምስቱ ፡ አዕጻድ ፡ ይሳመካ ፡ አሐቲ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ካልእታ ፡ ትሳመክ ፡ ወኀምስቱ ፡ አዕጻድ ፡ ይሰናሰላ ፡ በበይናቲሆን ።

translations.lxx: And the five curtains shall be joined one to another, and the other five curtains shall be closely connected the one with the other.
translations.kjv: The five curtains shall be coupled together one to another; and other five curtains shall be coupled one to another.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ ሎንቱ ፡ መምሠጢሆን ፡ ዘሕብረ ፡ ያክንት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ከንፈረ ፡ ዐጸድ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገጸ ፡ አፍአ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ዳግመ ፡ መብዋእት ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make for them loops of blue on the edge of one curtain, on one side for the coupling, and so shalt thou make on the edge of the outer curtain for the second coupling.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make loops of blue upon the edge of the one curtain from the selvedge in the coupling; and likewise shalt thou make in the uttermost edge of another curtain, in the coupling of the second.

verses.geez:
፶መማሥጠ ፡ ትገብር ፡ ላቲ ፡ ለአሐቲ ፡ ዐጸድ ፡ ወ፶መማሥጠ ፡ ተገብር ፡ እምአሐዱ ፡ ገ[ጸ] ፡ ዐጸድ ፡ እምድኅሬሃ ፡
                  ለዳግምት ፡ ዐጸድ ፤ ገጾን ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይሳመካ ፡ በበይኖን ።

translations.lxx: Fifty loops shalt thou make for one curtain, and fifty loops shalt thou make on the part of the curtain answering to the coupling of the second, opposite each other, corresponding to each other at each point.
translations.kjv: Fifty loops shalt thou make in the one curtain, and fifty loops shalt thou make in the edge of the curtain that is in the coupling of the second; that the loops may take hold one of another.

verses.geez:
ወግበር ፡ ኍጻዳተ ፡ ፶ዘወርቀ ፡ ወደምር ፡ አዕጻደ ፡ አሐተ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ካልእታ ፡ በኍጻደት ፡ ወይኩን ፡ ደብተራሁ ፡
                  አሐደ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make fifty golden rings; and thou shalt join the curtains to each other with the rings, and it shall be one tabernacle.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make fifty taches of gold, and couple the curtains together with the taches: and it shall be one tabernacle.

verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ ዘሠቅ ፡ ይሴውሮ ፡ እምላዕሉ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዐሠርተ ፡ ወአሐደ ፡ ሠቀ ፡ ትገብር ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make for a covering of the tabernacle skins with the hair on, thou shalt make them eleven skins.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make curtains of goats’ hair to be a covering upon the tabernacle: eleven curtains shalt thou make.

verses.geez: ወለአሐቲ ፡ ሠቅ ፡ በእመት ፡ ኑኃ ፡ ፴ወፅፍኃ ፡ ርብዕ ፡ በእመት ፡ ለለአሐቲ ፡ ሠቅ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ አምጣኒሆን ።

translations.lxx: The length of one skin thirty cubits, and the breadth of one skin four cubits: there shall be the same measure to the eleven skins.
translations.kjv: The length of one curtain shall be thirty cubits, and the breadth of one curtain four cubits: and the eleven curtains shall be all of one measure.

verses.geez: ወደምር ፡ ፭ሠቀ ፡ [ወ፯ሠቀ ፡] ደምር ፡ በበይኖን ፡ ወዕፅፍ ፡ [ሳ]ድስተ ፡ ሠቀ ፡ እመንገለ ፡ ገጸ ፡ ደብተራ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt join the five skins together, and the six skins together; and thou shalt double the sixth skin in front of the tabernacle.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt couple five curtains by themselves, and six curtains by themselves, and shalt double the sixth curtain in the forefront of the tabernacle.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ መማሥጠ ፡ ፶ውስተከንፈረ ፡ ሠቅ ፡ ለአሐቲ ፡ ለእንተ ፡ ማእከል ፡ ድማሬ ፡ ሠቅ ፡ ወትገብር ፡ ፶መማሥጠ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ከንፈር ፡ ዘሠቅ ፡ አሐቲ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትዴመር ፡ ቀዳሚተ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make fifty loops on the border of one skin, which is in the midst for the joinings; and thou shalt make fifty loops on the edge of the second skin that joins it.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make fifty loops on the edge of the one curtain that is outmost in the coupling, and fifty loops in the edge of the curtain which coupleth the second.

verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ ኍጻዳተ ፡ ዘብርት ፡ ፶ወትዴምር ፡ ኍጻደተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መማሥጥ ፡ ወታኀብር ፡ ሠቃተ ፡ ወይኩን ፡ አሐደ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make fifty brazen rings; and thou shalt join the rings by the loops, and thou shalt join the skins, and they shall be one.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make fifty taches of brass, and put the taches into the loops, and couple the tent together, that it may be one.

verses.geez:
ወታነብር ፡ ገጸ ፡ ዘይፈደፍድ ፡ እምሠቅ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘተርፈ ፡ ትከድን ፡ ዘይፈደፍድ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አሥቃቀ ፡
                  ደብተራ ፡ ትከድን ፡ ከወላ ፡ ደብተራ ፤

translations.lxx: And thou shalt fix at the end that which is over in the skins of the tabernacle; the half of the skin that is left shalt thou fold over, according to the overplus of the skins of the tabernacle; thou shalt fold it over behind the tabernacle.
translations.kjv: And the remnant that remaineth of the curtains of the tent, the half curtain that remaineth, shall hang over the backside of the tabernacle.

verses.geez:
እመተ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዘይተርፍ ፡ ሠቃተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ይከድን ፡ እምግደሚሁ ፡ ለደብተራ ፡ እምለፌ ፡ ወእምለፌ ፡ ይክድን
                  ።

translations.lxx: A cubit on this side, and a cubit on that side of that which remains of the skins, of the length of the skins of the tabernacle: it shall be folding over the sides of the tabernacle on this side and that side, that it may cover it.
translations.kjv: And a cubit on the one side, and a cubit on the other side of that which remaineth in the length of the curtains of the tent, it shall hang over the sides of the tabernacle on this side and on that side, to cover it.

verses.geez: ወአግብር ፡ ዘትከድና ፡ ለደብተራ ፡ አምእስተ ፡ በግዕ ፡ ሕሡየ ፡ ወመንጦላዕታ ፡ ያክንተ ፡ እምገጸ ፡ ላዕሉ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make for a covering of the tabernacle rams' skins dyed red, and blue skins as coverings above.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make a covering for the tent of rams’ skins dyed red, and a covering above of badgers’ skins.

verses.geez: ወአግብር ፡ [አዕማደ ፡] ደብተራ ፡ ዘዕ[ፅ ፡ ዘ]ኢይነቅዝ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make the posts of the tabernacle of incorruptible wood.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make boards for the tabernacle of shittim wood standing up.

verses.geez: ዘዕሥር ፡ በእመት ፡ ዐምዱ ፡ ፩ወፅፍሑ ፡ እመት ፡ ወንፍቃ ።

translations.lxx: Of ten cubits shalt thou make one post, and the breadth of one post of a cubit and a half.
translations.kjv: Ten cubits shall be the length of a board, and a cubit and a half shall be the breadth of one board.

verses.geez:
መስከምተ ፡ ሠርዌሁ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ለ፩ዐምድ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይሰከም ፡ ዐምድ ፡ ለዐምድ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ግበር ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ለዐምደ ፡
                  ደብተራ ።

translations.lxx: Two joints shalt thou make in one post, answering the one to the other: so shalt thou do to all the posts of the tabernacle.
translations.kjv: Two tenons shall there be in one board, set in order one against another: thus shalt thou make for all the boards of the tabernacle.

verses.geez: ወአግብር ፡ አዕማደ ፡ ለደብተራ ፡ ፳ገጸ ፡ ምዕዋን ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make posts to the tabernacle, twenty posts on the north side.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make the boards for the tabernacle, twenty boards on the south side southward.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ዘብሩር ፡ [፵ስክትተ ፡] ትገብር ፡ ለ፳ዐምድ ፤ ክልኤ ፡ ስክትቱ ፡ ለዐምድ ፡ ፩[ለክልኤሆሙ ፡] ገጹ
                  ፡ ወክልኤ ፡ ስክትቱ ፡ ለ፩ዐምድ ፡ ለክልኤሆሙ ፡ ገጹ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make to the twenty posts forty silver sockets; two sockets to one post on both its sides, and two sockets to the other post on both its sides.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make forty sockets of silver under the twenty boards; two sockets under one board for his two tenons, and two sockets under another board for his two tenons.

verses.geez: ወካልእ ፡ እምገጸ ፡ ዐረቢ ፡ ፳ዐምዱ ፤

translations.lxx: And for the next side, toward the south, twenty posts,
translations.kjv: And for the second side of the tabernacle on the north side there shall be twenty boards:

verses.geez: ወስክትቶሙ ፡ ዘይጸውር ፡ አዕማደ ፡ ዘብሩር ፡ ፵ለለ፩ዐምድ ፡ ፪ስክትቱ ፡ ዘክልኤሆሙ ፡ ገጹ ።

translations.lxx: and their forty silver sockets: two sockets to one post on both its sides, and two sockets to the other post on both its sides.
translations.kjv: And their forty sockets of silver; two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.

verses.geez: ወእምድኅር ፡ እምገጸ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ገጸ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ትገብር ፡ ፯አዕማደ ፤

translations.lxx: And on the back of the tabernacle at the part which is toward the west thou shalt make six posts.
translations.kjv: And for the sides of the tabernacle westward thou shalt make six boards.

verses.geez: ወክልኤተ ፡ ዐምደ ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ለማእዝን ፡ ለደብተራ ፡ እምድኅር ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make two posts on the corners of the tabernacle behind.
translations.kjv: And two boards shalt thou make for the corners of the tabernacle in the two sides.

verses.geez:
ወዕሩየ ፡ ይኩን ፡ እምታሕቱ ፡ ይድረግ ፡ ዕሩየ ፡ እምቅፍረ ፡ ዐምዱ ፡ አሐደ ፡ ድደ ፡ ይኩን ፤ ከማሁ ፡ ግበር ፡
                  ለክልኤሆን ፡ ማእዝን ፡ ዕሩያተ ፡ ይኩና ።

translations.lxx: And it shall be equal below, they shall be equal toward the same part from the heads to one joining; so shalt thou make to both the two corners, let them be equal.
translations.kjv: And they shall be coupled together beneath, and they shall be coupled together above the head of it unto one ring: thus shall it be for them both; they shall be for the two corners.

verses.geez:
ወይኩን ፡ ሰማንቱ ፡ ዐምድ ፡ ወምዕማዱኒ ፡ ዘብሩር ፡ ፲ወ፯ለለ፩ዐምዱ ፡ ምዕማዱ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ምዕማዱ ፡ ለ፩ዐምድ
                  ፡ እምኵሉ ፡ ፍናሁ ።

translations.lxx: And there shall be eight posts, and their sixteen silver sockets; two sockets to one post on both its sides, and two sockets to the other post.
translations.kjv: And they shall be eight boards, and their sockets of silver, sixteen sockets; two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.

verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ መናስግተ ፡ እምዕ[ፅ ፡ ዘ]ኢይነቅዝ ፡ ፭ለ፩ዐምድ ፡ እምአሐዱ ፡ ገጸ ፡ ደብተራ ፤

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make bars of incorruptible wood; five to one post on one side of the tabernacle,
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make bars of shittim wood; five for the boards of the one side of the tabernacle,

verses.geez:
ወኀምስቱ ፡ መንስጉ ፡ እመስመኪሃ ፡ ለደብተራ ፡ እም[ካልእ] ፡ ገጻ ፡ ወ፭መንስጋ ፡ ለአኃሪ ፡ ዐምድ ፡ እመስመከ ፡
                  ደብተራ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ባሕር ።

translations.lxx: and five bars to one post on the second side of the tabernacle, and five bars to the hinder posts, on the side of the tabernacle toward the sea.
translations.kjv: And five bars for the boards of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the boards of the side of the tabernacle, for the two sides westward.

verses.geez: ወመንስግ ፡ ዘማእከለ ፡ ዐምድ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይለጽቅ ፡ እምአሐዱ ፡ መስመክ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ካልእ ፡ መስመክ ፡ ይዕዱ ።

translations.lxx: And let the bar in the middle between the posts go through from the one side to the other side.
translations.kjv: And the middle bar in the midst of the boards shall reach from end to end.

verses.geez: ወአዕማዲሁ ፡ ይትቀፈሉ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ ወመማሥጠ ፡ መናስግቲሁ ፡ ይትቀፈል ፡ ወርቀ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt gild the posts with gold; and thou shalt make golden rings, into which thou shalt introduce the bars, and thou shalt gild the bars with gold.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt overlay the boards with gold, and make their rings of gold for places for the bars: and thou shalt overlay the bars with gold.

verses.geez: ወተሐንጻ ፡ ለደብተራ ፡ በአርአያ ፡ አርአይኩከ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ደብር ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt set up the tabernacle according to the pattern shewed thee in the mount.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt rear up the tabernacle according to the fashion thereof which was shewed thee in the mount.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ ላቲ ፡ መንጦላዕታ ፡ ዘሕብረ ፡ ያክንት ፡ ወሜላት ፡ ወነት ፡ ክዑብ ፡ ወቢሰስ ፡ ፍቱል ፡ ወግብሩ ፡ ግብረ
                  ፡ ማእነም ፡ ወግበሮ ፡ ኪሩቤን ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make a veil of blue and purple and scarlet woven, and fine linen spun: thou shalt make it cherubs in woven work.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make a vail of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen of cunning work: with cherubims shall it be made:

verses.geez:
ወአንብሮ ፡ ዲበ ፡ አርባዕቱ ፡ አዕማድ ፡ ዕ[ፅ ፡ ዘ]ኢይነቅዝ ፡ ቅፉላን ፡ በወርቅ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ አዕማዲሁኒ ፡ ወር[ቅ]
                  ፡ ወአርእስቲሆን ፡ ወር[ቅ] ፡ ወመዓምዲሁ ፡ አርባዕቱ ፡ ዘብሩር ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt set it upon four posts of incorruptible wood overlaid with gold; and their tops shall be gold, and their four sockets shall be of silver.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt hang it upon four pillars of shittim wood overlaid with gold: their hooks shall be of gold, upon the four sockets of silver.

verses.geez:
ወአንብር ፡ መንጦላዕተ ፡ ዲበ ፡ አዕማድ ፡ ወአብእ ፡ ህየ ፡ ወሳጢቶ ፡ ለመጦላዕት ፡ ታቦተ ፡ ዘመርጡር ፡ ወይፍልጥ ፡
                  መንጦላዕት ፡ ወሳ[ጤ] ፡ ወቀሠፋየ ፡ ቤተ ፡ ምቅዳስ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt put the veil on the posts, and thou shalt carry in thither within the veil the ark of the testimony; and the veil shall make a separation for you between the holy and the holy of holies.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt hang up the vail under the taches, that thou mayest bring in thither within the vail the ark of the testimony: and the vail shall divide unto you between the holy place and the most holy.

verses.geez: ወትሴውር ፡ መንጦላዕት ፡ ታቦተ ፡ ዘመርጡር ፡ በቤተ ፡ መቅደሰ ፡ ምቅዳስ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt screen with the veil the ark of the testimony in the holy of holies.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt put the mercy seat upon the ark of the testimony in the most holy place.

verses.geez:
ወሥርዑ ፡ ማእደ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ መንጦላዕት ፡ ገጸ ፡ አፍአ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ [ወተቅዋመ ፡ ማኅቶት ፡ አንጻረ ፡ ማእድ
                  ፡] እምገጸ ፡ ዐረቢ ፡ ወትነብር ፡ ማእዱ ፡ እምገጸ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ምዕዋን ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt set the table outside the veil, and the candlestick opposite the table on the south side of the tabernacle; and thou shalt put the table on the north side of the tabernacle.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt set the table without the vail, and the candlestick over against the table on the side of the tabernacle toward the south: and thou shalt put the table on the north side.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ ላቲ ፡ መንጦላዕተ ፡ መምሠጠ ፡ እንተ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ያክንት ፡ ወሜላት ፡ ወነት ፡ ክዑብ ፡ ወቢሶስ ፡ ክዑብ ፡
                  በብዑደ ፡ ግብረት ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make a screen for the door of the tabernacle of blue, and purple, and spun scarlet and fine linen spun, the work of the embroiderer.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make an hanging for the door of the tent, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, wrought with needlework.

verses.geez:
ወትገብሩ ፡ ለመንጦላዕት ፡ ኀምስተ ፡ አዕማደ ፡ ወትቀፍሎሙ ፡ ቅፍሎ ፡ ወርቀ ፡ ወአርእስቲሁኒ ፡ ወር[ቅ] ፡ ወትሰብክ ፡
                  ሎንቱ ፡ ፭መዓምደ ፡ ዘብርት ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make for the veil five posts, and thou shalt gild them with gold; and their chapiters shall be gold; and thou shalt cast for them five brazen sockets.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make for the hanging five pillars of shittim wood, and overlay them with gold, and their hooks shall be of gold: and thou shalt cast five sockets of brass for them.
